name: shader-skill-pack
description: 6-skill suite for shader work across routing, fundamentals, stylization, lighting, volumetrics, and platform decisions — distilled from Maxime Heckel's shader articles.
author: harshii0509

attribution.label: Distilled from Maxime Heckel's shader writing

groupings.title: Router
groupings.description: Start here when an agent needs to choose the right shader family before implementing anything.

groupings.title: Fundamentals
groupings.description: Core GLSL, SDF, raymarching, uniforms, and first-principles shader construction.

groupings.title: Stylization
groupings.description: Halftone, dithering, painterly, comic, and graphic post-processing looks.

groupings.title: Lighting
groupings.description: Refraction, dispersion, Fresnel shaping, and caustic light effects.

groupings.title: Volumetrics
groupings.description: Clouds, light shafts, scattering, skies, and atmospheric rendering.

groupings.title: Platforms
groupings.description: React Three Fiber, render targets, FBO particles, TSL, WebGPU, and compute decisions.
